scripts.dev:tauri:cool: set CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2&& set CARGO_INCREMENTAL=1&& set CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0&& set PATH=%USERPROFILE%\.cargo\bin;%PATH%&& tauri dev
scripts.dev:tauri:fresh: npm run clean:tauri:light && npm run dev:tauri
scripts.dev:tauri:cool:fresh: npm run clean:tauri:light && npm run dev:tauri:cool
scripts.cargo:test:regression: cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --test session_regression --test provider_registry_regression --test tool_router_regression --target-dir target-test
scripts.clean:tauri:light: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$targets=@('target-check','target-test','target-test-exact-a','target-test-exact-b','target-test-exact-c','target-check-tests','target-check-tests-a','target-check-tests-b','target-check-tests-c','target-check-tests-pa020-a','target-check-tests-pa020-b','src-tauri/target-check','src-tauri/target-codex-provider-guard'); $targets += (Get-ChildItem 'src-tauri' -Directory -Filter 'target-codex-*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }); foreach($t in $targets){ if(Test-Path $t){ Remove-Item -LiteralPath $t -Recurse -Force } }"
scripts.clean:tauri:deep: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$targets=@('target','target-check','target-test','target-test-exact-a','target-test-exact-b','target-test-exact-c','target-check-tests','target-check-tests-a','target-check-tests-b','target-check-tests-c','target-check-tests-pa020-a','target-check-tests-pa020-b','src-tauri/target','src-tauri/target-check','src-tauri/target-codex-provider-guard'); $targets += (Get-ChildItem 'src-tauri' -Directory -Filter 'target-codex-*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }); foreach($t in $targets){ if(Test-Path $t){ Remove-Item -LiteralPath $t -Recurse -Force } }"
scripts.verify: npm run test:unit && npm run build && npm run cargo:check:shared
